artist.translate: художник, артист, мастер своего дела, эстрадный артист

examples.eng: He has an artist's eye.
He was made to be an artist.
The artist caught the likeness.
She has an artist's eye.
He is something of an artist.
a fine example of the artist's work
He's an artist in the kitchen.
examples.ru: На кухне он настоящий мастер своего дела.

examples.eng: Why does not this artist go to nature?
examples.ru: Почему этот художник не обратится к природе?

examples.eng: The artist executed his ideas in stone.
examples.ru: Художник реализовал свои идеи в камне.

examples.eng: Rembrandt is considered a blue-chip artist.
an unsuspecting tourist fleeced by a scam artist
examples.ru: доверчивый турист, которого обобрал до нитки какой-то кидала

examples.eng: an artist with a fragile ego
He fancies himself an artist.
the artist's daring use of color
an artist who works with enamels
the climax of the artist's career
He has an artist's eye for color.
examples.ru: У него намётанный на цвета глаз художника.

examples.eng: an artist known for her seascapes
The artist must first learn to see.
the artist's portrait of his mother
an artist admired for his abstracts
She is an artist of immense talent.
a pitcher who is a strikeout artist
examples.ru: питчер, который мастерски выбивает страйкауты (о бейсболе)

examples.eng: the wide appeal of the artist's work
the great artists of the Renaissance
The artist's gifts are at their acme.
examples.ru: Таланты художника достигают своей высшей точки.

examples.eng: This artist works mostly in acrylics.
examples.ru: Этот художник работает в основном в акриле.

examples.eng: an artist skillful in the use of color
He's still playing at being an artist.
examples.ru: Он до сих пор играет в "художника".

examples.eng: an artist who works in silver and gold
examples.ru: художник, который работает в серебре и золоте
